HEARING RE: INTERVENOR NATIONAL UNION FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY PITTSBURG, PA'S. Motion To File Complaint In Intervention.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. National Union Fire Insurance Company of Pittsburgh, Pa.'s unopposed motion to file complaint in intervention is granted.

The Court will review the prevailing party's proposed order.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RASIER, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order As To Confidential Information is GRANTED with modification. Either all parties will have to sign it or it will need to be revised nonsubstantively to delete reference to it as a stipulation. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at: bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in its entirety.
